description_html:
A two-round individual competition designed to test both aesthetic design skills and practical Linux problem-solving ability. Participants compete in a desktop customization challenge followed by a live scripting challenge.

Theme will be the official fest theme

Design must meaningfully reflect the theme (color, mood, workflow, or concept)

Allowed:

  • Any Linux distribution
  • Any window manager or desktop environment
  • Custom GTK/QT themes, status bars, widgets, scripts, animations
  • Modified dotfiles from others with proper credit
  • Open-source tools and assets

Submission Requirements:

  • Screenshots:
  • Screen recording
  • Dotfiles repository with README, setup steps, dependencies, and credits
  • Design write-up (300–500 words)

Competition Structure:

  • Round 1: Linux Ricing (Online)
  • Round 2: Linux Scripting (Offline / Physical)

Requirements: 

  • One laptop per person with Ethernet support
  • USB-to-Ethernet adapter if required
  • Exclusively use linux distribution

organizer.organisation_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology, Design and Manufacturing (IIITDM), Kancheepuram
